hero.tagline: Student developers fueled by coffee, code, and curiosity. Building the future, one commit at a time.
hero.release_subtitle: The open-wheel strategy boardgame is officially released. Build your version, chase the payout, and jump into the grid today.

services.title: Our Passion
services.subtitle: Started as individuals at school, we grew into a team of creators exploring both board games and computerized simulations.

items.web_projects_desc: Building fun, experimental, and useful websites using modern frameworks like React and Vue.
items.mobile_experiments_desc: Tinkering with native and cross-platform mobile apps to learn and solve real-world problems.
items.open_source_desc: Contributing to and maintaining open source projects. We believe in sharing knowledge.
items.hackathons_desc: Participating in hackathons to challenge ourselves, meet new people, and build cool stuff fast.
items.creative_coding_desc: Exploring the intersection of art and code. Making things that look cool and inspire.
items.learning_together_desc: Sharing resources, hosting workshops, and growing together as a community of developers.

feed.subtitle: Recent actions from the platform so returning players can see the economy and forum moving.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: Established in 2025, we are a team of students bridging the gap between board games and computerized simulations. What started as individual passion projects converged when we met at school, uniting under a shared vision.

milestone1.title: The Spark
milestone1.desc: Started as individuals working on personal projects. School brought us together.

milestone2.title: Board Game Origins
milestone2.desc: Formed the team and began developing board games after class.

milestone3.title: Digital Shift
milestone3.desc: Ventured into computerized simulation and webapps, embracing 'vibe-coding' with Trae.

milestone4.title: Official Launch
milestone4.desc: Setting up our backend server and launching the official website. Expanding from our Bilibili community to the world.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: We are F1 fans, aviation enthusiasts, and creative minds. While some of us code, others design, bringing a diverse set of skills to the table. Based in China but open to the world, we are growing our community beyond our 1000+ Bilibili fans.
mission.quote: Code is our canvas, and we are just getting started. Let's build something awesome together.
mission.author: The GPS Team

products.title: Hard-Core Mechanisms
products.subtitle: Computerized simulations and boardgames focused on aviation and motorsports. No flashy UI—just pure functionality.
products.no_items: No products found in this category.

flight_sim.name: Box This Lap
flight_sim.description: F1 constructor championship game focused on race-weekend decisions and points maximization.
flight_sim.mechanism: Constructor strategy drafting, budget-risk balancing, dynamic scoring based on race outcomes.

race_strategy.name: DeltaDash
race_strategy.description: Officially released open-wheel boardgame with delicate strategy management and memes.
race_strategy.mechanism: Sophisticated strategy management, resource luck-press, expansion compatibility, and live community payout competition.

telemetry.name: Telemetry Analyzer
telemetry.description: Tool for analyzing racing telemetry data to optimize lap times.
telemetry.mechanism: Data ingestion pipeline, suspension travel analysis, cornering G-force mapping, throttle/brake trace overlay.

atc_sim.name: Terminal Control
atc_sim.description: Air Traffic Control simulation for high-density terminal airspace.
atc_sim.mechanism: Aircraft separation algorithms, wake turbulence modeling, RNAV approach pathing, conflict detection logic.

skyline_tragedy.name: Skyline Tragedy
skyline_tragedy.description: 6-DOF simulation with comprehensive flight initialization and parameter configuration.
skyline_tragedy.mechanism: 6-DOF physics, SSO integration, difficulty scaling, NPC crew intelligence.

minigame.title: Paddock Club
minigame.subtitle: Choose your challenge

reaction.title: F1 Reaction Test
reaction.desc: Test your reaction time against the lights. Can you beat an F1 driver?

pit_stop.title: Pit Stop Challenge
pit_stop.desc: Change tyres as fast as you can!
pit_stop.instructions: Drag tyres to change. Hold mouse to loosen/tighten bolts.
pit_stop.step1_desc: Hold on the red nut until it turns green.
pit_stop.step2_desc: Drag the old tyre away, then drag in a new one.
pit_stop.step3_desc: Hold again to secure the wheel.

gt_pit_stop.title: GT/Rally Pit Stop
gt_pit_stop.desc: Open door, pull driver out, jack the car, change 4 tyres with bolts, clean up, and manually start.
gt_pit_stop.instructions: Drag door, driver, and rear storage; drag jack and toggle lever to green; hold to unscrew/secure bolts; drag new tyres from storage; lower jack (red), return jack/tyres; get back in, close the door, then Manual Start.
gt_pit_stop.objective: Complete the full GT/Rally pit procedure and change all 4 tyres.
gt_pit_stop.step1_desc: Open door, pull driver out, open rear storage, take jack, raise to green.
gt_pit_stop.step2_desc: Unscrew bolts, remove old tyres, install new tyres from storage, secure bolts.
gt_pit_stop.step3_desc: Lower jack (red), return jack & tyres, get back in, close door, Manual Start.

duel.title: One-Lap Duel (2026)
duel.desc: Strategic 1v1 racing. Manage ERS, choose racing lines, and develop your driver.

policies.market_content:
Our market allows you to trade tickets and support projects.

Prices fluctuate based on demand. High risk items like Driver Bets can result in total loss.

Always do your own research before investing.
policies.token_rep_content:
Tokens are our internal currency for trading and rewards.

Reputation reflects your contribution and trustworthiness. High reputation unlocks advanced features like creating campaigns.
policies.mission_content:
Complete missions to earn Tokens and Reputation.

Submissions are reviewed by admins. Quality work is rewarded; spam or low-effort submissions will be rejected.
policies.betting_content: Betting involves risk. Driver Bets are binary outcomes (Win/Lose).
policies.fees_content: A 2% fee applies to all market transactions to support the platform.
policies.minigame_content: Minigames are for entertainment. Spamming or using bots to farm rewards is prohibited and will result in a ban.

telemetry.title: Live Telemetry Analysis
telemetry.subtitle: Powered by OpenF1 API. In-memory cache enabled.
telemetry.select_driver_prompt: Please select at least one driver from the sidebar.

hud.no_data: No telemetry stream is available for this driver in the selected session.

rules.rule_1: Hidden roles: TP (public), TC, IS, ST
rules.rule_3: Positive wins by firing all negatives
rules.rule_4: Negative wins by causing team expulsion
rules.rule_5: Each round: night actions → race → discussion → voting
